name: SwarmMind
description: Autonomous AI Agent Swarm — 4 specialized AI agents that coordinate, learn, and evolve together on Twitter/X 24/7 without human intervention. Each agent has its own persona, RAG memory, engagement feedback loops, and real-time data feeds from 15+ APIs.

supported_tools.name: twitter-graphql-api
supported_tools.description: Cookie-based Twitter/X GraphQL client for posting, replying, searching, and notifications

supported_tools.name: twitter-oauth-api
supported_tools.description: X API v2 with OAuth 1.0a for authenticated posting and media upload

supported_tools.name: gemini-text-generation
supported_tools.description: Google Gemini 3 Flash for tweet generation, reply crafting, self-evaluation, and persona evolution

supported_tools.name: gemini-image-generation
supported_tools.description: Google Gemini Imagen for AI-generated images attached to tweets

supported_tools.name: veo-video-generation
supported_tools.description: Google Veo 3.1 for 6-second cinematic video clips attached to tweets

supported_tools.name: defi-llama-api
supported_tools.description: DeFi Llama API for Solana TVL, protocol rankings, and day-over-day changes

supported_tools.name: coingecko-api
supported_tools.description: CoinGecko API for real-time crypto prices, 24h changes, and trending coins

supported_tools.name: rss-aggregator
supported_tools.description: RSS feeds from CoinTelegraph, The Block, Decrypt filtered for ecosystem relevance

supported_tools.name: mempool-api
supported_tools.description: Mempool.space API for Bitcoin mempool stats, fees, and on-chain metrics

supported_tools.name: sqlite-rag-memory
supported_tools.description: Per-agent SQLite database for conversation history, replied tweets, engagement metrics, and state persistence

supported_tools.name: playwright-browser
supported_tools.description: Chromium browser automation for cookie extraction and stealth authentication

coordination.shared_brain: All agents share one GeminiBrain instance for consistent quality
coordination.action_lock: asyncio.Lock prevents simultaneous posting across agents
coordination.shared_replied_db: SQLite tracks all replied tweets, preventing double-replies
coordination.staggered_sessions: Random 50-100s start offset per agent mimics human patterns
coordination.persona_evolution: AI rewrites each agent's personality every 48h based on engagement metrics

safety_guardrails.spam_filter: Regex + LLM-based spam detection on incoming mentions
safety_guardrails.rate_limiting: Per-user reply limits (3/day for key accounts, 2/week for others)
safety_guardrails.self_evaluation: 7-criteria quality check before publishing (voice, repetition, formatting, value, cringe, specificity, analyst value)
safety_guardrails.content_validation: Post-generation validation strips @mentions, enforces character limits, blocks airdrop spam
safety_guardrails.sleep_windows: Configurable UTC sleep hours per agent (no activity during off-hours)
safety_guardrails.error_backoff: Exponential backoff on consecutive errors, auto-pause on rate limits
